nasb.text: These are the sons of Ehud: these are the heads of fathers’ households of the inhabitants of Geba, and they carried them into exile to Manahath,

esv.text: These are the sons of Ehud (they were heads of fathers’ houses of the inhabitants of Geba, and they were carried into exile to Manahath):

cnv.text: 以下這些人是以忽的子孫，他們是迦巴居民各家族的首領，曾被擄到瑪拿轄。
